description: Atmosfera Sonora v2: playTick em interações, volume slider persistente, SOUND_KITS per-theme (pro/neon/8bit/gameboy/sketch) com synth fallback, reactive CSS pulse no h1. Per-theme MP3 sets e BiquadFilter explicitamente fora de escopo. Implementation: proj-multifile-v2/ui.js:1-86, state.js:8-18, layout.css:740-748.
